Combat sport events in 2023
ONE Friday Fights 6: Gingsanglek vs. Kongthoranee
PromotionONE Championship
DateFebruary 24, 2023 (2023-02-24)
VenueLumpinee Boxing Stadium
CityBangkok, Thailand
Event chronology
ONE Friday Fights 5: Kongklai vs. Superball ONE Friday Fights 6: Gingsanglek vs. Kongthoranee ONE Fight Night 7: Lineker vs. Andrade

ONE Friday Fights 6: Gingsanglek vs. Kongthoranee (also known as ONE Lumpinee 6) was a combat sport event produced by ONE Championship that took place on February 24, 2023, at Lumpinee Boxing Stadium in Bangkok, Thailand.[1][2]

Background

[edit]

The preliminary card event live on FanDuel TV, prelim headlined by a bantamweight kickboxing bout between former ONE Flyweight Kickboxing World Champion Ilias Ennahachi and Aliasghar Ghodratisaraskan, main card live on YouTube and Facebook: ONE Championship, headlined by a flyweight muay thai bout between Gingsanglek Tor.Laksong and former Rajadamnern Stadium Super bantamweight and Lightweight champion Kongthoranee Sor.Sommai.[3] The pairing first met at SuekJaoMuayThai in Omnoi Stadium on April 24, 2021, which Gingsanglek won by unanimous decision.[4] Their second meeting took place at Amarin Super Fight: Chang Muay Thai Kiatpetch in Rajadamnern Stadium on March 20, 2022, which Kongthoranee won by TKO (doctor stoppage) in the round five.[5]

A featherweight bout between Anzor Chakaev and Leonardo Casotti was scheduled for this event.[3] However, Casotti stepped in to face Martin Nguyen at ONE Fight Night 7 on February 25 and the bout was cancelled.[6]

Results

[edit]
Main card (YouTube / Facebook)
Weight class Method Round Time Notes
Flyweight Muay Thai Kongthoranee Sor.Sommai def. Gingsanglek Tor.Laksong KO (punch) 2 1:02
Catchweight (141 lbs) Muay Thai Khunharnlek Singha Mawynn def. Petchmanee Sor.Jaruwan Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Atomweight Muay Thai Khunsueklek Boomdeksian def. Koko Sor.Sommai Decision (split) 3 3:00
Catchweight (143 lbs) Muay Thai Petsaenkom Yaicheyseafood def. Yodprabsuk Sor.Ninthai Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Flyweight Muay Thai Johan Ghazali def. Padetsuek Fairtex KO (punch) 1 0:16
Atomweight Muay Thai Chokdee Maxjandee def. Yoddoi Kaewsamrit Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Preliminary card (FanDuel TV)
Bantamweight Kickboxing Ilias Ennahachi def. Aliasghar Ghodratisaraskan KO (punch) 2 1:20
Lightweight Kickboxing Bogdan Shumarov def. Marwen Houli KO (punch) 1 1:15
Bantamweight Brogan Stewart-Ng def. Riccardo Cantindig-Stagg Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Bantamweight Muay Thai Hercules Wor.Chakrawut def. Shingo Shibata Decision (unanimous) 3 3:00
Catchweight (118 lbs) Muay Thai Celest Hansen def. Kalaked Por.Muangpetch TKO (punches) 3 2:36

[7]

Bonus awards

[edit]

The following fighters received $10,000 bonuses.[8]

  • Performance of the Night: Kongthoranee Sor.Sommai, Johan Ghazali, Bogdan Shumarov and Celest Hansen
